companyName.zh: 腾讯 · 微信私域项目

summary.en: Late-2023 retrospective of a WeChat private-domain operations playbook within Tencent — repositioned from selling a platform to selling outcome accompaniment, with measurable success rates lifted from the industry's <20% to 40–50%. Includes a BMC, VPC, design-criteria canvas, and experiment canvas, plus a long-form narrative tying them together.
summary.zh: 2023 年底对腾讯内部微信私域运营项目的复盘:从“卖平台”转向“卖效果陪伴”,把行业里 < 20% 的成功率拉到 40–50%。包含商业模式、价值主张、设计准则、实验四张画布,以及一篇贯通的长篇叙事。

sources.label: Internal retrospective by sibo (Tencent), recorded December 2023
